title-1: These order settings are your trading safety net
title-2: Set the auto-close parameters to curb the risks
text-1: Put a limit on how much of your investment you’d be willing to lose before the position closes automatically
text-2: Safeguard your investment from a sudden change of trend once you’ve reached the desired profitability
title-3: You can set these parameters both for a new position and an existing one
note: Available for Forex and Cryptocurrency trading
